rationale: The cited paper is mentioned in the introduction only as part of a grouped list of prior "truth-telling" approaches in marketing, alongside randomized response and related work. The citing paper does not return to Ding et al. (2005) in its theory development, model specification, simulations, or empirical analysis. No specific construct, method, or result from the cited conjoint paper is used to build the ICRT contribution. So the citation functions as broad background positioning rather than a meaningful intellectual dependency.
